name: @polyshield/circuits
description: Polyshield ZK circuits. The active set is Circom/Groth16 in groth16/ (built via packages/circuits/pipeline). The Noir .nr files in the other subdirectories are a spec reference only. circomlib is declared here so the relative includes in groth16/lib/*.circom (`../../node_modules/circomlib/...`) resolve to packages/circuits/node_modules/circomlib after `pnpm install`.
